about.label: Who we are
about.heading: Success starts with trust
about.body: Eto Capital is a Nordic owner partner working closely with founders and management teams. We believe the best companies are built by people who are passionate about what they do. Our role is to give them the tools, the network, and the support to reach their full potential.

strategy.label: Our philosophy
strategy.heading: Accelerating entrepreneurship, with respect at its core

pillars.title: Hands-on commitment
pillars.description: We don't sit on the sidelines. We roll up our sleeves and work side by side with the management team — in strategy, in recruitment, in the everyday.

pillars.title: Entrepreneur first
pillars.description: The company is your life's work. We listen before we act, respect your vision, and build on what already works. Our success is measured by yours.

pillars.title: Built for the long term
pillars.description: We don't chase quick wins. Every investment is made with the conviction that lasting value creation requires patience, trust, and genuine commitment.

footer.tagline: Eto Capital is a Nordic owner partner working closely with founders and management teams to build market-leading companies.
